case_title: CARY S. COLLINS VS NORTH AMERICAN ALARM CO.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-30-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-14-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,082.13 FILED BY CARY S. COLLINS AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICAN ALARM CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICAN ALARM CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARY S. COLLINS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICAN ALARM CO. $1,747.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,797.00, COST OF PILLOW AND THEIR FABRIC NOT ALLOWED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
